_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and implementing APIs for data services, including RESTful endpoint design, request and response formatting, error handling, authentication integration, and API documentation using OpenAPI or equivalent specifications.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.422), AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.401).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.326). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analyzing, pcap] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, apis, authentication, design, designing, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.873, R=0.828). P exceeds R by 0.045 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Skill in analyzing PCAP data" and "Skill in designing and implementing APIs for data services, including RESTful en" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.471 > STS 0.326 (gap +0.146). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [analyzing, pcap]. WIDAI-only: [api, apis, authentication, design, designing, documentation].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.146 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
